runtime.title: Live / Paper Runtime Status
runtime.subtitlePost: . This page does not authorize connectors, start runners, stop runners, submit orders, cancel orders, or change mandates.
runtime.unavailableHint: Treat connector runtime as unavailable until the backend provides a current status snapshot.
runtime.noProfilesBody: The backend did not return any recognized live or paper broker profiles.
runtime.riskHaltedDesc: The kill switch is tripped for this profile. Treat connector runtime as stopped until status clears.
runtime.riskActiveDesc: Runner is alive and an unexpired mandate is present. This page is still read-only status only.
runtime.riskIdleDesc: Authorization and mandate are present, but the runner is not alive.
runtime.riskDormantDesc: Connector runtime is not ready for autonomous operation because authorization, mandate, or runner liveness is missing.
runtime.missingLongbridgeVariables: Missing configuration. Configure these variables in agent/.env and recreate the service:
runtime.diagnosticCredentialsPartial: Credentials are incomplete. Configure all required variables and recreate the service.
runtime.diagnosticCredentialsConflict: Credential sources conflict. Keep one complete source, then retry.
runtime.diagnosticSdkMissing: The Longbridge SDK is not installed in the backend service.
runtime.diagnosticAuthenticationFailed: Authentication failed. Check the configured credentials.
runtime.diagnosticNetworkUnreachable: The Longbridge service is unreachable. Check network access and retry.
runtime.diagnosticBrokerError: The broker rejected the read-only verification request. Retry or check backend logs.

reports.title: Backtest Report Library
reports.subtitle: Browse historical backtest reports, metrics, and run details from one place.
reports.searchPlaceholder: Search run id, prompt, symbol, status...
reports.emptyBody: Create a backtest from Agent, then return here to review it.
reports.noMatchesBody: Adjust your search query, status filter, or date range.

welcome.title: Vibe-Trading
welcome.subtitle: Your Indian-market trading agent — NSE, BSE, F&O, paper & research
welcome.describePrompt: Describe an India trading idea to get started (equity, F&O, options, or paper trade).

examples.crossMarketPortfolioDesc: Risk-parity on RELIANCE, TCS, HDFCBANK, INFY
examples.crossMarketPortfolioPrompt: Build a risk-parity portfolio with RELIANCE.NS, TCS.NS, HDFCBANK.NS, INFY.NS, backtest for the full year of 2024, and compare with an equal-weighted Nifty benchmark
examples.btcMacdPrompt: Backtest a MACD strategy on RELIANCE.NS 5-minute bars: fast=12, slow=26, signal=9, last 30 trading days. Use India equity costs (STT, stamp, brokerage).
examples.usTechMaxDivDesc: Max diversification on HDFC, ICICI, SBI, Axis, Kotak
examples.usTechMaxDivPrompt: Backtest the maximum diversification portfolio for HDFCBANK.NS, ICICIBANK.NS, SBIN.NS, AXISBANK.NS, KOTAKBANK.NS for the full year of 2024
examples.reliancePaperBuyDesc: Place paper market buy of RELIANCE qty 1 via Upstox
examples.reliancePaperBuyPrompt: Use the upstox-paper-trade connector. Place a paper market buy of 1 quantity of RELIANCE. Confirm fill price, wallet cash after debit, and open position. Do not place a live order.
examples.niftyOptionsWatchDesc: Monitor Nifty ATM CE/PE; act only if confidence ≥ 80%
examples.niftyOptionsWatchPrompt: Monitor Nifty 50 ATM call and put options. Tell me clearly ENTRY / WAIT / EXIT. Only recommend or place a paper order if confidence ≥ 80% and risk-reward ≥ 1:2. Otherwise only alert — do not order.
examples.bankniftyIntradayDesc: Multi-TF Bank Nifty futures scalp with stop & targets
examples.bankniftyIntradayPrompt: Analyse BANKNIFTY futures for an intraday setup using 5m/15m/1h alignment. Give entry, stop-loss, target 1/2, confidence score, and RR. If confidence ≥ 80%, outline a paper order plan for 1 lot on upstox-paper-trade.
examples.bankniftyOptionsWatchDesc: Monitor Bank Nifty ATM CE/PE; order only if confidence ≥ 80%
examples.bankniftyOptionsWatchPrompt: Monitor Bank Nifty (BANKNIFTY) ATM call and put options for today/weekly expiry. Tell me clearly ENTRY / WAIT / EXIT with strike, premium, stop, and targets. Only recommend or place a paper order if confidence ≥ 80% and risk-reward ≥ 1:2. Otherwise only alert — do not order.
examples.hdfcBankOptionsDesc: ATM CE/PE on HDFCBANK with entry/exit rules
examples.hdfcBankOptionsPrompt: Analyse HDFCBANK.NS stock options (nearest expiry ATM CE and PE). Give directional bias from cash + options premium action, entry, stop, targets, and confidence. If confidence ≥ 80%, outline a paper buy of 1 lot of the preferred CE or PE on upstox-paper-trade; otherwise wait.
examples.indiaFnoWatcherDesc: Watch RELIANCE; auto paper-trade qty 1 at ≥80% confidence
examples.indiaFnoWatcherPrompt: Help me configure the India market watcher for RELIANCE only: min confidence 80%, auto-trade enabled, quantity 1, profile upstox-paper-trade, include stock options. Give the exact vibe-trading watch config and start commands, then explain entry and exit behaviour.
examples.multiFactorAlphaPrompt: Build a multi-factor alpha model using momentum, reversal, volatility, and turnover on Nifty 50 constituents (equity_in) with IC-weighted factor synthesis, backtest 2023-2024
examples.optionsGreeksDesc: Black-Scholes Greeks for a Nifty ATM weekly
examples.optionsGreeksPrompt: Calculate option Greeks using Black-Scholes for a Nifty-like ATM weekly: spot=24000, strike=24000, risk-free rate=6.5% (India), vol=12%, expiry=7 days. Analyse Delta/Gamma/Theta/Vega and say whether a long CE, long PE, or wait is higher probability.
examples.valueCommitteePrompt: Use run_swarm with the value_investing_committee preset to analyze Reliance Industries (RELIANCE.NS): Buffett on moat & price, Munger on inversion, Duan Yongping on business & management, Li Lu on 10-year certainty, then the chair synthesizes consensus and contradictions
examples.bottleneckHunterDesc: Find Layer 2/3 choke points in India electronics / EMS / power
examples.bottleneckHunterPrompt: Use the bottleneck-hunter skill to find Layer 2/3 supply-chain bottleneck opportunities in India electronics manufacturing / EMS / power electronics, score each choke point and list NSE/BSE candidate companies that pass the valuation gate
examples.thesisTrackerDesc: 5-sentence thesis + red lines for HDFC Bank
examples.thesisTrackerPrompt: Use the thesis-tracker skill to build an investment thesis for HDFC Bank (HDFCBANK.NS): 5-sentence core thesis, falsifiable assumptions, red lines, and valuation anchors, verified with financial_rigor
examples.valuationCheckDesc: Verify PE / PB / ROE for TCS with exact arithmetic
examples.valuationCheckPrompt: Use the financial_rigor tool to verify TCS valuation: price 3800, EPS 130, book value per share 320 — compute PE, PB, ROE exactly, then a three-scenario valuation (growth 12%/8%/0%, PE 28/22/16, 3 years)
examples.investmentCommitteeDesc: Multi-agent debate: long vs short on Infosys
examples.investmentCommitteePrompt: [Swarm Team Mode] Use the investment_committee preset to evaluate whether to go long or short on INFY.NS given current Indian market conditions, IT sector outlook, and USD/INR
examples.quantStrategyDeskPrompt: [Swarm Team Mode] Use the quant_strategy_desk preset to find and backtest the best momentum strategy on Nifty 50 constituents for 2023-2024
examples.earningsReportDesc: Upload a NSE company annual/quarterly PDF
examples.earningsReportPrompt: Summarize the key financial metrics, risks, and outlook from the uploaded Indian company earnings / annual report. Highlight guidance vs Street and any SEBI/disclosure flags.
examples.macroResearchDesc: RBI policy impact on NSE equities & F&O
examples.macroResearchPrompt: Read the latest RBI monetary policy statement and summarize its impact on Nifty 50, Bank Nifty, INR, and India VIX. Give actionable bias for equity and index options for the next 2 weeks.
examples.analyzeBrokerExportDesc: Parse Zerodha / Upstox / Dhan / Groww CSV — win rate, holding days
examples.analyzeBrokerExportPrompt: Analyze the Indian broker trade journal I just uploaded (Zerodha/Upstox/Dhan/Groww/generic CSV) — full profile with holding stats, win rate, top symbols, F&O vs cash mix, and hourly distribution
examples.diagnoseBehaviorDesc: Disposition, overtrading, chasing, anchoring on India trades
examples.diagnoseBehaviorPrompt: Run the 4 behavior diagnostics on my trade journal (disposition, overtrading, chasing, anchoring) and tell me which bias hurts my PnL most — call out F&O overtrading if present
examples.checkConnectorDesc: List India connectors and verify the selected profile
examples.checkConnectorPrompt: List my trading connector profiles (especially Upstox, Dhan, Shoonya), show which one is selected, then check that selected connector. If Upstox token or paper wallet setup is missing, tell me exactly what to do. Do not place or modify orders.
examples.analyzePortfolioDesc: Account, positions, concentration from selected connector
examples.analyzePortfolioPrompt: Use the selected trading connector profile (prefer upstox-paper-trade) to summarize my account, positions, concentration in NSE names, cash, and portfolio risk. Do not place or modify orders.
examples.quoteTrendDesc: RELIANCE quote + 30 daily bars via connector
examples.quoteTrendPrompt: Use the selected trading connector to fetch a RELIANCE quote and 30 daily bars, then summarize the current quote versus the recent trend, support/resistance, and India VIX context. Keep it read-only.
examples.trainShadowDesc: Extract rules from Zerodha/Upstox CSV into a Shadow profile
examples.trainShadowPrompt: Train my shadow account from the Indian broker trading journal I just uploaded — show the extracted rules (holding days, entry style, F&O vs cash) and confirm they look like my behavior
examples.shadowDelta: How Much Am I Leaving on the Table?
examples.shadowDeltaDesc: Shadow vs actual PnL on NSE trades last 90 days
examples.shadowDeltaPrompt: Run a shadow backtest for the last 90 days on my Indian equity/F&O journal and break down where my PnL diverged from the shadow (rule violations, early exits, missed signals)
examples.shadowReportDesc: HTML/PDF — equity curve, NSE Sharpe, attribution
examples.shadowReportPrompt: Render the shadow report for my India trading profile and give me the URL — lead with the you-vs-shadow delta

settings.title: Settings
settings.authDesc: Enter the API auth key to unlock settings.
settings.reasoningEffortDesc: How hard the model thinks before answering. Higher is more thorough but slower; leave Off for fastest replies.
settings.dataSourcesDesc: Configure external data sources for the backtesting engine.
settings.tushareDesc: China A-share historical data (requires TUSHARE_TOKEN env var).
settings.baostockDesc: Alternative A-share data via TCP protocol (no API key needed).
settings.localApiAccessDesc: For remote or private Web UI deployments, enter the server API key once in this browser. Localhost use can stay blank.
settings.storedInBrowser: Stored only in this browser. Leave blank to clear it.
settings.subtitle: Configure model credentials and market data source tokens for this local project.
settings.llmSettingsDesc: Choose the model used by the agent and save it to the project-local agent/.env file.
settings.modelIdHint: Use the exact model id required by your provider.

channels.title: IM Channels
channels.description: Connect chat adapters to the same Vibe-Trading session runtime used by the Web UI and CLI.

settings.dataSourceSettingsDesc: Configure optional market data credentials used by backtests and research agents.
settings.loadDataSourceSettingsFailed: Failed to load data source settings: {{message}}
settings.saveDataSourceSettingsFailed: Failed to save data source settings: {{message}}
settings.keepCurrentKey: Leave blank to keep the current key
settings.noApiKeyRequired: This provider does not require an API key.
settings.keepCurrentToken: Leave blank to keep the current token
settings.iwencaiDesc: Used for semantic stock screening via iWenCai (问财). Free access key required.
settings.fredDesc: Used for FRED macroeconomic data (CPI, GDP, unemployment, etc.). Free key from fred.stlouisfed.org.
settings.featureFlagsDesc: Runtime feature flags detected from environment variables.
settings.flagsReadFrom: Flags are read from {{env1}}, {{env2}}, and {{env3}} in {{env_path}}.

qveris.title: QVeris Tool Marketplace
qveris.subtitle: Keep free public data as the default, or enable paid QVeris execution for specialized data tools.
qveris.apiKeyPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep the current key
qveris.budgetHint: Paid execution stops when this session budget is reached.
qveris.signupHint: Use this invitation code when creating your QVeris account.

agent.describeGoal: Describe the research goal to attach to this session
agent.placeholder: e.g. Create a dual MA crossover strategy for 000001.SZ, backtest 2024
agent.inputHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for a new line
agent.executablesNotAllowed: Executables and archives are not allowed
agent.failedToSend: Failed to send message, please retry.
agent.failedToContinue: Failed to continue goal, please retry.
agent.evidenceCollectedTitle: Evidence collected toward this research goal

runDetail.title: Run Detail
runDetail.runNotFoundDesc: The run directory may have been removed, or your browser may not have API access configured. Check that the API authentication key is set in Settings if accessing remotely.
runDetail.noChartDataDesc: The backtest engine may not have generated price data. Check the artifacts/ directory.
runDetail.pickSymbolToLoad: Pick a symbol to load chart data.

compare.title: Strategy Comparison
compare.selectTwoRuns: Select two runs to compare their metrics.
compare.loadError: Failed to load run data. Please try again.

correlation.title: Correlation Matrix
correlation.regimeTimelineHint: Edge density + hysteresis over time — descriptive risk context, not a trading signal

alphaZoo.title: Alpha Zoo
alphaZoo.browseDesc: Browse formula-driven cross-sectional signals from Qlib, the Kakushadze 101 set, GTJA 191, the academic anomaly literature, and PIT-safe fundamentals. Click any alpha to read its formula and source code, or run a bench to score the whole zoo on a universe and period.
alphaZoo.noAlphasMatch: No alphas match the current filters.
alphaZoo.scoreZoo: Score a zoo on a universe
alphaZoo.scoreDesc: Computes IC / IR for every alpha in the selected zoo over the chosen universe and period, then bucketizes them as alive / reversed / dead.
alphaZoo.compareDesc: Benches just the alphas you pick on a universe and period, then ranks them by IC / IR with the gap to the leader — far faster than benching a whole zoo when you only care about a shortlist.
alphaZoo.alphaIdsHint: Separate ids with commas or spaces. Tip: tick alphas in the catalogue and hit "Compare" to prefill this.
alphaZoo.enterAtLeast2: Enter at least 2 distinct alpha ids to compare.
alphaZoo.icPositiveTitle: Share of periods with positive IC
alphaZoo.predictiveHalfLifeTitle: Predictive half-life: trading days before the signal's edge decays

zooCardDesc.qlib158: Microsoft Qlib's full 158-feature library covering momentum, volatility, volume and rolling statistical signals.
zooCardDesc.alpha101: The 101 formulaic alphas from Kakushadze (2015); short-horizon cross-sectional signals.
zooCardDesc.gtja191: Guotai Junan Securities' 191 alphas; technical and microstructure signals tuned to China A-share markets.
zooCardDesc.academic: Curated long-horizon anomalies from the academic literature (value, momentum, quality, low-vol, etc.).
zooCardDesc.fundamental: Quality and value factors computed from PIT-safe SEC company facts — earnings yield, ROE, gross profitability, asset growth (filed-date anchored).

alphaZoo.compareTooltip: Tick 2+ alphas below, then compare them head-to-head

validation.monteCarloDesc: Shuffled trade order {{n}} times to test if Sharpe is better than random.
validation.bootstrapDesc: Resampled daily returns {{n}} times to estimate {{pct}} confidence interval.
validation.walkForwardDesc: Split into {{n}} sequential windows to check performance consistency.

runnerStatus.connectProfile: Connect this profile to enable connector runtime
runnerStatus.authorizeNote: The connector channel stays read-only until OAuth succeeds and a mandate is committed.
runnerStatus.noActiveMandate: No active mandate. Ask the agent to propose one, then commit it before starting the connector runtime.

mandate.noBroker: Cannot commit mandate: connector broker is missing. Ask the agent to regenerate the proposal.
mandate.adjustPlaceholder: e.g. keep this but raise the daily cap to 10
mandate.confirmDescription: This grants the agent trading authorization under the limits shown below and takes effect immediately.

messageBubble.timeoutHint: Execution timed out. Try simplifying the strategy or reducing the number of assets.
messageBubble.apiFailedHint: API call failed. Please retry later.

pineViewer.footer: TradingView Pine Editor → New blank indicator → Paste code → Add to Chart

home.title: AI-Powered Quant Strategy Research
home.subtitle: Describe a trading strategy in natural language. The agent generates code, runs backtests, and optimizes — all in real time.
home.dashboardSubtitle: Paper wallet cash & P&L, watcher day/month returns, order capability, live audit logs, and recent research runs.
home.paperWalletHint: Add virtual money, run your logic with Upstox paper orders, and see cash / equity / profit or loss before investing real capital.
home.noTradesYet: No closed watcher trades yet. Start the watcher to populate day/month P&L.
home.noAuditYet: No live audit entries yet. Paper/live orders append to ~/.vibe-trading/live/audit.jsonl.
home.featureAgentDesc: Natural language strategy generation with ReAct reasoning
home.featureBacktestDesc: Multiple data sources covering A-shares quantitative analysis
home.featureStreamingDesc: Watch the agent think, call tools, and iterate
home.featureReplayDesc: Trade journal analyzer + Shadow Account — extract your rules, backtest them, attribute PnL delta
home.step1Desc: Tell the agent what you want to test, in plain language — no code required.
home.step2Desc: The agent plans, pulls market data, and runs the backtest live, so you can follow every step.
home.step3Desc: See performance metrics, the equity curve, and exportable Pine Script for the strategy.
home.step4Desc: Optionally approve a trading mandate with explicit limits — nothing trades without your confirmation.
